---
name: Bug report
about: Something Claude did (or didn't do) that wasn't right
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What you asked Claude

Paste the exact prompt or describe the PM task you were working on.

```
[your prompt here]
```

## What happened

What did Claude actually output? Paste the relevant part of the response.

## What you expected

What should Claude have done instead? Be specific — this helps us improve the skill instruction.

## Plugin version

Run `/plugin list` in Claude Code and paste the strategic-pm version shown.

- Version: `1.0.0`

## Claude plan & version

- Plan: (Free / Pro / Max / Team / Enterprise)
- Claude version: (e.g., Claude 3.5 Sonnet — shown in Claude.ai settings or Claude Code)
- Install method: (Claude Code / Claude.ai ZIP upload / Admin-provisioned)

## Additional context

Any other context that might help — screenshot, follow-up prompts, etc.
